## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, keyword performance, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing positive results: 30k impressions, growing presence vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Top-performing content: cement industry, advanced process control, workforce-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Need to leverage content across channels (e.g., social media) and develop gated content for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Team to review technical accuracy and align on future product direction for content planning](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Impressions and clicks at record high (\~30k impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Using AI tool to analyze presence vs competitors (grew from 25% to 28% in last 7 days)](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Content pillars: optimization/efficiency (main focus), digital transformation, sustainability, workforce](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Keyword strategy balances high-volume terms (e.g., advanced process control: 4k monthly searches) with niche long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Top-performing articles often industry-specific (e.g., cement) or address key pain points (e.g., operator training)](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [7 new articles/week, following writing guidelines based on client conversations](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Content refreshment workflow to update underperforming pieces](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Aiming for balance between general process industry content and vertical-specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Need for technical review to ensure accuracy and depth](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)

### Future Content Plans

  - [Developing content series on topics like industrial AI and energy management](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Creating predictions for next decade in AI optimization, aligning with Imubit's future direction](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Potential to create gated content (e.g., PDF guides) for each vertical to generate leads](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

### Cross-Channel Content Utilization

  - [Current gap in leveraging blog content for social media (LinkedIn, Twitter)](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Opportunity to repurpose top-performing SEO content into multiple social media posts](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tara and Dan to sync on roles/responsibilities for content distribution and social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Team to explore creating gated content, starting with cement industry](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2038.0)
  - [Mariana to prepare content funnel strategy for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
  - [Establish process for technical review of content, potentially involving product team](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Align content planning with upcoming product launches and messaging shifts](https://fathom.video/share/4XfZ9QmhqoyNaxwyCjf16iu8N9jpBP9Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
